_comment: Sample MCP client config for the mra server. The MCP server defaults to DENY: every tool call is rejected unless either (a) MRA_ALLOWED_WORKSPACES lists the workspaces you authorize, or (b) MRA_MCP_OPEN_MODE=1 is set explicitly. Open mode is intended only for single-user trusted setups; allowlist is strongly preferred. On POSIX separate paths with ':' (delimiter shown below); on Windows use ';'.
